justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all temporal expressions provided by the user throughout the conversation.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent consistently reported unavailability and then asked the user to pick a new time without offering any alternative options.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The conversation involved multiple turns where the agent simply reported unavailability and then prompted the user for a new time, which could have been more efficient if alternatives were offered.
justifications.customer_experience: The experience was workable but became tiring due to the agent's repeated apologies and its inability to proactively suggest alternative times, placing the burden of finding a slot entirely on the user.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent maintained context but did not intelligently expand its search or offer alternatives, instead relying on the user to provide new dates and times after each unavailability report.
